name: Poppy Seed Cake
recipeInstructions:
CAKE
1. Soak the poppy seeds in scalded milk overnight.
2. Cream together the sugar and butter until smooth.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt three times.
4. Add the soaked poppy seeds to the mixture.
5. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
6. Gradually fold the egg whites into the poppy seed mixture.
7. Divide the batter into three layers.
8. Bake at 350°F for 25 minutes.
FILLING
1. In a double boiler, cook together sugar and cornstarch until thickened.
2. Add hot water to thin the mixture if needed.
3. Stir in lemon juice.
4. Sprinkle chopped nuts over each cake layer.
5. Frost the top and sides of the cake.
